## 2025-02-04 - Hardcoded Secrets & Token Leak
**Vulnerability:** Hardcoded fallback JWT secret (`'dev-secret'`) in `JwtStrategy` and unignored `token.json` containing sensitive iFood API token.
**Learning:** Dev secrets used for local development often leak into production code as fallbacks if environment variables are missing. Tokens generated by external services can be accidentally committed if not immediately added to `.gitignore`.
**Prevention:** Enforce "Fail Secure" by throwing errors when secrets are missing instead of using fallbacks. Audit repo for sensitive files and ensure `.gitignore` covers them before committing.
